name: Island Teriyaki
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine first 6 ingredients.
2. Cut meat across grain in strips 1 inch wide.
3. Use tenderizer according to label directions.
4. Add meat to soy mixture, stirring to coat; let stand 15 minutes at room temperature.
5. Lace strips accordion-style on skewers.
6. Broil 5 inches from heat 5 to 7 minutes or till cooked rare to medium-rare, turning frequently and basting with soy marinade (or cook and baste over charcoal).
7. Serve hot as an appetizer.
Note: If you plan to marinate longer than 15 minutes, do not use tenderizer.
